title: hypolepis stolonifera var. stolonifera
intro: Hypolepis stolonifera var. stolonifera, also known as the stoloniferous hypolepis, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Hypolepis and is native to various parts of the world, including Africa, Asia, and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Hypolepis stolonifera var. stolonifera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
